findings.text: Bank statement covers 01/09/2025 to 28/04/2026 for account holder Anfal Abdalla Musa Elbushra.
Total outgoings £19,057.59 and total deposits £19,057.88 over the statement period.
Extracted transactions from 13-27 April 2026 include Uber Eats, PrettyLittleThing, M&S, Greggs, Klarna, and personal transfers.
Only ~6k of ~27k tokens were excerpted; full transaction list for Sep 2025-Apr 2026 is incomplete.

proposed_artifacts.content: Full transaction list extracted from NAP-SRC-0012 covering 01/09/2025-28/04/2026. Includes all debits, credits, descriptions, dates, and running balances. Note: OCR confidence 0.85; verify amounts and descriptions against original PDF.
proposed_artifacts.title: Full transaction list from NAP-SRC-0012

proposed_tasks.instructions: Perform a complete OCR extraction of all transactions from NAP-SRC-0012 (Monzo bank statement 01/09/2025-28/04/2026). Ensure the full transaction list is captured, including all debits, credits, dates, descriptions, and running balances. If token limits are a concern, split the extraction into multiple parts. Verify amounts and descriptions against the original PDF.
proposed_tasks.title: Full OCR extraction of all transactions from NAP-SRC-0012 (complete coverage)

risk_flags.description: Incomplete transaction data may lead to inaccurate financial analysis or missed evidence of hardship.
OCR errors in amounts or descriptions could affect the reliability of the extracted data.
The prior extraction artifact (v5) is marked as validated but only contains partial data; reliance on it may be misleading.

summary: Prior extraction (v5) of NAP-SRC-0012 (Monzo statement 01/09/2025-28/04/2026) captured only ~6k of ~27k tokens, covering 13-27 April 2026. The full transaction list for the entire 8-month period is missing. This task proposes a follow-up extraction to obtain the complete set of debits, credits, dates, descriptions, and running balances.

uncertainties.description: Full transaction list for the entire 8-month period is missing; only a subset of transactions from 13-27 April 2026 was extracted.
OCR confidence is 0.85; amounts and descriptions may contain errors and require verification against the original PDF.
The source PDF is 654 KB; the extraction method may have been truncated due to token limits.
